content:
Looking for players for a Morimens-themed DnD Oneshot/Campaign. Time slots are listed in your timezone here:
Group A: <t:1755907200:F>
Group B: <t:1755734400:F>
Group C: <t:1755939600:F>
Feel free to contact me through DMs if you are interested!
If the time slots don't work with you but you're still curious, please contact me and we can try to work out a time that works with you!
